title: OSF UI Settings Schema
description: Schema for settings/<id>.json files. Bridge protocol 0.1 (unstable). Mirrors src/runtime/SettingsStore.cpp validation.

$schema.description: Optional editor hint; ignored by the runtime.

id.description: Mod id. Defaults to the filename stem. Also the per-mod values filename under Documents\My Games\Starfield\OSF UI\settings\<id>.json.

title.description: Card header shown in the settings view. Defaults to id.

key.description: Stable identifier, unique within the mod. Used as the persisted key and in settings.set/settings.reset.

type.description: Control + validation kind. int/float clamp to [min,max]; enum must be one of options; string truncates to 256 chars.

default.description: Initial value, used until the user changes it and on reset. Should match the type.
